title: Test Fixture Schema
description: Shape of fixture files in tests/fixtures/. Allows any agent to produce test fixtures the QA harness can load. Owned by QA. Authority: Architect.

fixture_id.description: Stable identifier; used in test names.

kind.description: Categorises the fixture so the right validator runs.

data.description: Arbitrary fixture payload. The schema is open here; each `kind` implies its own structure validated separately.

authored_by.description: Agent or human who created this fixture.

purpose.description: Why this fixture exists (e.g. 'regression case for issue #42').

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of fixture creation.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering and grouping fixtures.
